{"type":"result","subtype":"success","is_error":false,"api_error_status":null,"duration_ms":468936,"duration_api_ms":409632,"ttft_ms":2763,"num_turns":45,"result":"Step 1 완료. 변경 사항 요약:

**Backend (4파일)**
- `schemas.py`: `MyBidRecordCreate`에 `announcement_no`, `actual_winner_rate`, `result` 필드 추가
- `admin.py`: `GET /admin/collector-status` 엔드포인트 신규 추가 — `today_notices`, `today_results`, `last_run_at`, `next_run_at` 반환 (06:00/18:00 KST 스케줄 기반)
- `bids.py`: `GET /bids/search?announcement_no=` 경량 자동완성 엔드포인트 신규 추가, `Bid` 모델 import 추가
- `my_bids.py`: 생성 시 `rate_diff` 자동계산 + 업데이트 시에도 `actual_winner_rate` 변경 때마다 `rate_diff` 재계산

**Frontend (4파일)**
- `types/index.ts`: `MyBidRecord`에 `rate_diff`·`announcement_no` 추가, `CollectorStatus`·`BidSearchItem` 타입 신규
- `api/index.ts`: `adminApi.collectorStatus()`, `bidsApi.search()` 추가
- `AdminPage.tsx`: 수집기 상태 카드에 오늘 수집 공고/결과 수·마지막 수집·다음 수집 예정 시각 실시간 표시
- `MyBidsPage.tsx`: 투찰 등록 모달 전면 개선 — 공고번호 debounce 검색·자동완성 드롭다운, 결과 선택, 낙찰자 사정율 입력, `rate_diff` 실시간 계산 표시","stop_reason":"end_turn","session_id":"9e91c1a0-55d8-45ec-8ba0-3f38e3b1b4b7","total_cost_usd":2.0193393,"usage":{"input_tokens":38,"cache_creation_input_tokens":120331,"cache_read_input_tokens":3686984,"output_tokens":26262,"server_tool_use":{"web_search_requests":0,"web_fetch_requests":0},"service_tier":"standard","cache_creation":{"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":120331,"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":0},"inference_geo":"","iterations":[{"input_tokens":1,"output_tokens":498,"cache_read_input_tokens":120065,"cache_creation_input_tokens":266,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":0,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":266},"type":"message"}],"speed":"standard"},"modelUsage":{"claude-haiku-4-5-20251001":{"inputTokens":13635,"outputTokens":2284,"cacheReadInputTokens":62676,"cacheCreationInputTokens":29309,"webSearchRequests":0,"costUSD":0.06795884999999999,"contextWindow":200000,"maxOutputTokens":32000},"claude-sonnet-4-6":{"inputTokens":38,"outputTokens":26262,"cacheReadInputTokens":3686984,"cacheCreationInputTokens":120331,"webSearchRequests":0,"costUSD":1.9513804499999998,"contextWindow":200000,"maxOutputTokens":32000}},"permission_denials":[{"tool_name":"Bash","tool_use_id":"toolu_01SoeVP7DFLo98Tmai72UK6j","tool_input":{"command":"cd "/d/a2m/atom-harness-g2b/bid-system/frontend" && npx tsc --noEmit 2>&1 | head -60","timeout":60000,"description":"TypeScript type check for frontend"}}],"terminal_reason":"completed","fast_mode_state":"off","uuid":"a8a8ee7d-4205-4591-a5da-60ec439c5477"}
